question: Save a checkpoint of our current session so I can resume later after a disconnect.
ground_truth: The agent loads the session-memory skill, creates a timestamped session directory, and writes session_state.md, timeline.md, files.md, and handoff.md.
expected_behavior: The agent read session-memory/SKILL.md before acting
The agent created a timestamped directory under session/
The agent wrote session_state.md with the current goal and status
The agent wrote handoff.md with resume instructions

question: I just reconnected after VS Code crashed. Can you pick up where we left off?
ground_truth: The agent loads the session-memory skill, finds the latest session directory, reads handoff.md and session_state.md, verifies git state, and resumes from the last verified next action.
expected_behavior: The agent read session-memory/SKILL.md before acting
The agent found and read the latest session directory
The agent read handoff.md first, then session_state.md
The agent verified git state before continuing

question: This is going to be a long debugging session. Please preserve context periodically.
ground_truth: The agent loads the session-memory skill, creates a session directory, and commits to checkpointing at regular intervals during the long-running work.
expected_behavior: The agent read session-memory/SKILL.md before acting
The agent created a session directory
The agent wrote an initial session_state.md
The agent planned to checkpoint at least every 30 minutes

question: What is the difference between GRPO and DPO algorithms?
ground_truth: The agent should not activate the session-memory skill for a simple knowledge question.
expected_behavior: The agent did not read or activate session-memory/SKILL.md

question: Run the linter on the nemo_rl/ directory and fix any issues.
ground_truth: The agent should not activate the session-memory skill for a short linting task.
expected_behavior: The agent did not read or activate session-memory/SKILL.md
